CustomField.description: Date on which this lease option was exercised by the Lessee or Lessor(as applicable).This will mark this option as Exercised for reporting purposes.It was designed to capture a written notice date
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date on which this lease option was exercised by the Lessee or Lessor(as applicable).This will mark this option as Exercised for reporting purposes.It was designed to capture a written notice date
CustomField.label: Exercised Date
